title: Outta This World
description: A sink full of planets and exploration, as a modpack.
body:
Outta This World is a modpack made with QuestCraft in mind.

### WARNING! THIS MODPACK IS BEING UPDATED
As I am writing, this modpack is being updated to support FTB Quests, and Fancymenu, stay tuned for version 2

## Roadmap
- Version 2 - FTB Quests and Fancymenu
- Version 3 - KubeJS

# Made For QuestCraft
With careful concideration, this is made with QuestCraft in mind.

# Performance
Made with Performance in mind, we use Embeddium for support with QC 5.0 with all the performance improvements that are not yet merged into QuestCraft

*Mods may be changed, please check the version for the list of mods, all credit goes to them for making those amazing mods.*
